job.title: Senior ABAP Developer
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As a Senior ABAP Developer in Avignon, you develop SAP solutions and support our clients in their SAP implementation and evolution projects.
mission.3: Optimise the performance of SAP developments
mission.4: Carry out impact studies and technical specifications
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in computer science
profile.3: Proficiency in ABAP OO, BAPI, IDoc, Smartforms, and ABAP Workbench
profile.4: Knowledge of SAP Basis is a plus
profile.5: Certification SAP ABAP is a plus
